title: CCL - Restore defaults
scenario: CCL setting does not reset to "UC Noise Block" after restoring device to default settings on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a CCL-supported Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Locate the Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting and select either 'No Noise Block' or 'AI Noise Block'.
7. Tap on 'Reset Device' > 'Restore' to restore the device to default settings.
8. After the reset completes, navigate back to Device Settings > Advanced.
9. Observe the current Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting.
expected: The Call Clarity Level (CCL) setting should revert to 'UC Noise Block' regardless of the previously selected option.
